title: Creamy Australian Chicken Bowl
description: A flavorful Italian-inspired dish featuring roasted chicken, creamy sauce, and a hint of Australian spices.

ingredients.name: Australian-inspired spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most grocery stores or online

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the Australian-inspired spice blend, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the spice blend mixture all over the chicken breasts, making sure to coat them evenly.
Place the chicken breasts on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is roasting, cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced roasted red peppers and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, or until fragrant.
Stir in the creamy sauce and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the creamy sauce.
Once the chicken is done roasting, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
Add the sliced chicken to the pasta and toss to combine.
Serve the Creamy Australian Chicken Bowl hot, garnished with chopped basil if desired.
